chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Transfer Application No.S-43 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. No.9293/2020. 23.12.2020 Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Kalhoro, Advocate for the applicant. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. == Urgency granted. It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that each and every application moved by the applicant has been dismissed and the respondents have been admitted to bail, therefore, the applicant has lost his faith over the Presiding Officer of learned Trial Court. By stating so, he sought for transfer of the case of the applicant to some other Court. If, for the sake of argument, it is believed that each and every application has been dismissed and private respondents have been admitted to bail by learned Trial Judge then such orders are subject to challenge and those could hardly be permitted to be made a reason for the applicant to seek transfer of his case. Consequently, the instant Criminal Transfer Application being misconceived is dismissed. JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*
